scripts.validate: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/sdsl-cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/sdsl-cli -- validate app.api.loj
scripts.build:generated: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/sdsl-cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/sdsl-cli -- build app.api.loj --out-dir generated
scripts.validate:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/sdsl-cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/sdsl-cli -- validate app.fastapi.api.loj
scripts.build:generated:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/sdsl-cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/sdsl-cli -- build app.fastapi.api.loj --out-dir generated-fastapi
scripts.py:compile:fastapi: npm run build:generated:fastapi && python3 -m compileall generated-fastapi/app generated-fastapi/tests
scripts.mvn:test: npm run build:generated && mvn -Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/sdsl-user-service test -f generated/pom.xml
scripts.mvn:run: npm run build:generated && mvn -f generated/pom.xml spring-boot:run
